LightningComponentBundle.description: B2B Commerce storefront list of the logged-in account's Quotes with All/Open/Closed filter, server-side sorting and pagination, and status badges.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency code
property.description: ISO currency code used to format the Amount column.

property.name: detailPageApiName
property.label: Quote details page API name
property.description: API name of the Experience Builder page (URL /quote-details) that hosts the Capsa B2B Quote Details component. The quote number links here.
